creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #19)
I have no idea about it.

On upstream project, its version is "1.3.0-dev" and the next relese version will be "1.3.0", defined in lib/viewvc.py as __version__, and then the version of branch head would be "1.3.1-dev".  Versions "*-dev" don't distingish its revisions.

So I think the version number of viewvc port can be defined only for FreeBSD port users' benefit.
